channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New NRG Energy CEO focuses on growth with 'bring your own power' for AI and affordability via 'virtual power plants'
item.description: Robert Gaudette takes over ready to tackle the power constraints of AI and the affordability concerns of residents.

item.title: Wall Street watches Kevin Warsh at the Fed for red and green flags
item.description: "Confirmation hearings are political theater rather than substance, and he [was] plenty smart enough to avoid saying anything tangible."

item.title: Gen X is America's most indebted generation; employers can help
item.description: Student loan matching programs are on the books. Does your company have one?

item.title: A 45,000-person labor strike at Samsung's memory chip plants could disrupt the AI boom
